feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Released CDS Views for Handling Unit Information in Inbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Good day!

I am facing a challenge in retrieving Handling Unit (HU) header and item information through released CDS views.

Scenario:

  • I create an inbound delivery from the Post Goods Receipt for Production Order app.
  • After packing, the Handling Unit information is available in the system.
  • However, I could not find any released CDS view that provides the HU header and item details.

During my analysis, I found the following CDS views, and they contain the required HU information: I_HANDLINGUNITHEADERCOMBINED

I_HANDLINGUNITITEMCOMBINED

Unfortunately, both of these CDS views are not released for either Key User Extensibility or Developer Extensibility, so they cannot be consumed in a custom development.

Could anyone please suggest:

  • Any released CDS views that provide Handling Unit header and item information?
  • Any recommended APIs or alternative approaches?
  • Any SAP blogs, documentation, or best practices related to retrieving Handling Unit information in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud: Get Values from multiple tabs in Purchase Order Notes
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am trying to get the values of the multiple tabs of the Notes in Purchase Order, but I only seem to get the value of the Header Text tab only. I was wondering how I would be able to get the value of different tabs as I would be using the values in them to display in the print forms.

Regards,
Ley

entry.title: How to Link Two Analytical Queries in Embedded SAC App? "A linked dimension" Error
entry.content:
How to Link Two Analytical Queries in Embedded SAC App?
"A linked dimension for this model is not included in the visualization's dimension bindings" Error

I am creating an Embedded SAC Application in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and trying to link two Analytical Queries using Company Code. Both Company Code fields have the same data type, semantics, and values, and the link is created successfully.

However, the widget shows the error:

"A linked dimension for this model is not included in the visualization's dimension bindings."

How can I correctly connect/link these two queries? Is there any additional configuration required for linked dimensions or dimension bindings?

entry.title: how to create project billing request using API in sap public cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

In our project, we need to create project billing request via API same as in application "Manage project Billing".

I found this standard API is fit my needs, but we are facing some issues.
Overview | Project Billing Request | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

In post : http://projectbillingrequest/SAP__self.CreateProjectBillingRequest
There is a restriction for BillingWBSElementInternalID string 8.

But in our system billing element is more than 8.

Is there way to create project billing request using Standard API?

Best Regards,

entry.title: Forms Label Translation
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I would like to seek your assistance in if there is an translation application, tool, or CDS view in S/4HANA Cloud Public that can be used to translate form labels. For example, if I want to translate a form label from English to Dutch, I would like to provide the English label as input and receive the corresponding Dutch translation as the output.
 
Thank you!
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
SAP Forms service by Adobe

entry.title: Default User Layout in Material Documents Overview App
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We would like to set a user-specific default layout in the Material Documents Overview app so that the same layout is automatically applied whenever the app is accessed, either directly or indirectly.

We tested this behavior in the SAP Public Cloud environment. The default layout works correctly when the app is accessed directly. However, when the Material Documents Overview app is launched from another application, such as Display Stock Overview (MMBE), the system resets the layout to the standard default instead of retaining the user-specific layout.

As a result, users must manually select and apply their preferred layout each time, which impacts reporting consistency and requires additional time and effort.

Please confirm whether this is the standard system behavior or if there is a configuration or enhancement available to ensure that the user-specific default layout is retained regardless of how the app is accessed?

entry.title: Request for Alternative SAP App for Invoice-wise Collection Posting
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We have a requirement from our customer to post invoice-wise collection data without using the following apps:

  1. Post Incoming Payments (F1345)
  2. Clear Incoming Payments (F0773)

Could you please suggest an alternative standard SAP core app or self-service app that supports invoice-wise collection posting?

We appreciate your guidance and look forward to your recommendation.

We have aleady created a custom role only read permission allowed with this two app but getting authorization error to do this clearing

entry.title: Reverse 553 movement
entry.content:
Dear Team

What is the process to change cost center and reverse 553 movement if user have done wrong entry through inspection lot.

entry.title: Intercompany STO - Use Sales Price (ESP2) as Purchase Price in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We are implementing an Intercompany Stock Transfer scenario in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Scenario

Delivering Plant: 1050 (Company Code 1010, Germany)
Receiving Store: 3940 (Company Code 3910, Austria)

Our requirement is to determine the purchase price of the intercompany stock transfer from the sales price condition (ESP2).

Currently, the standard pricing procedure uses condition type PPR0, which determines the price via Purchasing Info Records.

We created our own condition type ZVPV as a copy of PPR0. However, in the Partner Demo system the access sequence cannot be modified because it is restricted.

Our questions are:

Is it possible in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to determine the intercompany purchase price directly from the sales condition ESP2?
Is maintaining Purchasing Info Records the SAP standard approach, or is there a recommended alternative?
Is the restriction of changing Access Sequences only a limitation of the Partner Demo system, or does the same restriction exist in productive Public Cloud systems?
What is the SAP Best Practice for this scenario?

We have attached screenshots showing:

Purchase Order Pricing Analysis
Pricing Procedure
Sales Order Pricing (ESP2 determined successfully)

Thank you very much for your support.

Best regards,
Mustafa Kocabeyoglu

entry.title: Issue regarding service entry sheet
entry.content: Facing issue while generating service entry sheet for service POs. Showing no data found or invalid line items after slecting PO.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Best practice for multiple Reporting Entities in Statutory Report
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition rollout and I would like to clarify the recommended approach for configuring Reporting Entities for statutory reporting.

The customer has two different legal entities (two different Company Codes), each with its own Tax Identification Number and Tax Office.

Example:

Company Code A
Portuguese legal entity with its own NIF
Tax Office: [Tax Office A]
Company Code B
Different Portuguese legal entity with a different NIF
Tax Office: [Tax Office B]

In the Statutory Reporting configuration, under:

Reporting Entity → Enter Parameters Specific to Reporting Entity

there are parameters such as PT_TA_CAE.

My questions are:

For two different legal entities with different NIFs, is the recommended approach to create two separate Reporting Entities (one per legal entity), or can both Company Codes be assigned to the same Reporting Entity with one Leading Organizational Unit?
If multiple Company Codes are assigned to the same Reporting Entity, how are entity-specific parameters such as PT_TA_OFFICE and Tax Identification Number handled?
Is there any SAP Best Practice or recommendation for localization when multiple legal entities are implemented in the same S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system?

Any guidance or experience from similar implementations would be highly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: PR Workflow Issue
entry.content:
We are planning to revise the existing workflow and implement the new approval process based on Document Type.

However, during the configuration of the Purchase Requisition (PR) Flexible Workflow, we observed that the Document Type field is not available in the workflow item-level start conditions in our system.

As the new approval matrix is proposed to be driven based on Document Type, we kindly request your support in verifying whether this field can be enabled or made available in our server for PR workflow configuration.

entry.title: How to automate MM period closing using the MMPV Close Period app - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
We would like to schedule the MM period close job (MMPV) to run automatically on a monthly basis in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
When creating a recurring job for the MMPV transaction directly, the period parameter is mandatory and remains fixed at the value entered at job creation time, it does not auto-increment for each subsequent monthly run.

Our questions:

  1. Is it possible to schedule the period close so the posting period is automatically determined each month?
  2. Does the "Use current date" flag in the scheduling options allow the system to determine the correct MM posting period automatically?
  3. If automatic determination is not supported, is manual maintenance of the period parameter the standard behavior?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 信用管理咨询：在未超过信用总额度的情况下，如何基于客户“超期未清项”自动拦截交货单？
entry.content:
Document must be blocked for above 100,000.00 CNY.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Account Assignment Category not worked with Item Category Enhanced
entry.content:
Currently, we are using custom account assignment categories for Cost center, project & Assets. It worked well with Blank Account assignment category but not worked with Item Category Enhanced (E) 

Combination item category E/account assignment category L not defined

Message no. ME066

entry.title: Availability of Application-Specific User Guides for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello

We would like to confirm whether SAP provides official application-specific user guides or operation manuals for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

We are aware that general application information, implementation details, business catalogs, and related scope items can be found in the SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library and SAP Help Portal.

However, we are looking for more detailed documentation for each individual Fiori application, including:

 

- Step-by-step instructions for using the application

- Descriptions of screen fields, buttons, and functions

- Typical business process examples

- Prerequisites and operational considerations

- Downloadable user manuals or PDF documents, if available

 

Could you please confirm the following?

 

1. Does SAP provide an official user guide or operation manual for each Fiori application in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

2. Where can these application-specific guides be accessed?

3. Are downloadable PDF manuals available, or are the guides provided only through the SAP Help Portal?

4. If separate application-specific manuals are not available, what is the recommended official source for preparing end-user training materials for each application?

 

Please provide the relevant SAP Help Portal links or other official documentation.

 

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Regarding ATP verification based on variant selection
entry.content:
Please tell me about Variant Configuration in an S/4HANA Public Cloud TDD environment.
We would like to dynamically perform an ATP check and provide a delivery date confirmation based on the characteristic values ​​selected on the variant configuration screen.
Is this possible in S/4HANA Cloud?
・Calculate the delivery date by checking stock, purchase requisitions, planned orders, purchase orders, production orders, etc., for the configuration items selected on the variant configuration screen.

entry.title: How to post Free of Charge Delivery (BDA) inventory consumption to an expense account instead of COG
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and are currently using the standard Scope Item BDA – Free of Charge Delivery for free sample deliveries.

During testing we observed that the PGI generated from a Free of Charge Delivery (CBFD / CBXN) creates a material document with Movement Type 601, resulting in the standard accounting entry:

Debit: Cost of Goods Sold
Credit: Inventory

From a Finance perspective, our business expects free samples to be recognized as a Sample/Marketing Expense instead of Cost of Goods Sold, while still crediting Inventory.

Has anyone implemented a similar requirement in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Specifically:

Is there any standard configuration (SSCUI/CBC) that allows different G/L account determination for this scenario?
Does CBFD or CBXN influence account determination during PGI?
What is the SAP-recommended approach for this business requirement?

Any experience or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

Hiram Treviño

entry.title: Minor difference * INR 10 cannot be allocated across company codes
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have posted a Down Payment of INR 1,200 in Company Code 1001. We now want to clear/pay this advance from our Parent Company Code 1000 in USD currency, where the equivalent amount is USD 13.72.

However, during the payment process, although we are paying USD 13.72, the actual advance amount being cleared is INR 1,200. When we simulate the payment transaction, the system throws the following error:

"Minor difference INR 10 cannot be allocated across company codes."

entry.title: Error in account determination of Real Estate
entry.content:
Good morning, We are encountering an issue with the configuration of movement types and their account determination. Specifically, I am attempting to post movement type IN00 using the "Contract-Valuation Posting" app. This movement type is linked to the account symbol "CESP AO". Account symbol "CESP AO" is mapped to account number 16054000. However, when I run the posting simulation, it incorrectly shows account 16051000. 

Regards,

Raffaele
